title: justicia upembensis
intro: Justicia upembensis, also known as the Upemba justicia, is a flowering plant species native to the Democratic Republic of Congo. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Justicia upembensis include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Justicia upembensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
